query:
SELECT 
  id,
  pattern,
  patternType,
  description,
  replacement,
  severity,
  matchCount,
  isActive
FROM prompt_avoid_list
ORDER BY severity, matchCount DESC
LIMIT 30;

  replacement,
  severity,
